CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value INT);
SELECT id, value, (value >> 1) AS shifted_value FROM test_table WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, (value >> 3) AS shifted_value FROM test_table WHERE value BETWEEN 8 AND 32) AS subquery WHERE shifted_value < 5;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, multiplier INT);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value >> at.multiplier AS final_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table at ON t1.id = at.id;
SELECT id, value >> 1 + 5 AS complex_shift FROM test_table WHERE (value & 1) = 0;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table) >> 2 AS max_shifted_value;
SELECT CASE WHEN value > 0 THEN value >> 2 ELSE 0 END AS conditional_shift FROM test_table;
